SELECT datetrunc('month', event_date) AS truncated_month FROM date_test;
SELECT datetrunc('year', event_date) AS truncated_year FROM date_test WHERE event_date < DATE '2020-01-01';
SELECT event_date, datetrunc('day', event_date) AS truncated_day FROM date_test ORDER BY event_date DESC;
SELECT datetrunc('week', event_date) AS truncated_week, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM date_test GROUP BY truncated_week;
WITH date_group AS (SELECT datetrunc('month', event_date) AS month_trunc, COUNT(*) AS count FROM date_test GROUP BY month_trunc) SELECT month_trunc, count FROM date_group WHERE count > 1;
CREATE TABLE more_events (event_id INT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO more_events VALUES (1, DATE '1992-03-07'), (2, DATE '1992-03-15'), (3, DATE '2010-01-01');
SELECT d.event_date, d.event_id, datetrunc('month', d.event_date) AS month_trunc FROM date_test d JOIN more_events m ON datetrunc('month', d.event_date) = datetrunc('month', m.event_date);
SELECT DISTINCT datetrunc('quarter', event_date) AS truncated_quarter FROM date_test ORDER BY truncated_quarter;
